name: Cambridge Dry Rub (Thanks to Chris Schlesinger)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup dark or light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the top half of a double boiler set over simmering water.
2. Cook for about 20 minutes, stirring every 5 minutes or so, until the sugar begins to melt and the mixture thickens.
3. Remove from heat and let cool to 100 degrees F.
4. Pass the mixture through a sifter.
5. Use immediately or store in a cool, dark place for several months.
